= zip

Zip an array value with one or more argument arrays. Each array must match in length.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.foo.zip(this.bar, this.baz)

# In:  {"foo":["a","b","c"],"bar":[1,2,3],"baz":[4,5,6]}
# Out: {"foo":[["a",1,4],["b",2,5],["c",3,6]]}
----
